name: AI Voice Agent — Feedback & Learning Loop

nodes.name: Daily Analysis Trigger (2 AM IST)
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 2 AM IST to analyze previous day's conversations.

nodes.name: Fetch Yesterday's Conversation Logs
nodes.notes: Fetches all conversation logs from the past 24 hours.

nodes.name: AI Analysis — Identify Improvements

json.system: You are a conversation quality analyst. Analyze these customer service call transcripts and provide: 1) Common issues/patterns, 2) Moments where the AI struggled, 3) Specific prompt improvements, 4) Customer satisfaction signals, 5) Upsell success rate, 6) Language handling quality. Be specific and actionable.

messages.content:
Analyze these conversations from the last 24 hours:

={{JSON.stringify($json.conversations)}}

nodes.notes: Uses Claude to analyze all conversations and identify improvement areas.

nodes.name: Calculate Performance Metrics
nodes.notes: Calculates KPIs: call volume, avg turns, intent/language/emotion breakdowns, escalation rate, booking conversion.

nodes.name: Save Daily Report to Sheets
nodes.notes: Saves the daily analysis report and metrics for review.

nodes.name: Send Report via WhatsApp to Admin
nodes.notes: Sends a daily summary to the business admin via WhatsApp.

main: Send Report via WhatsApp to Admin
